findings: stampede-monitor.sh never reads child-agents.jsonl; launch proof relies solely on swarm-state.json counters.
launch_proof counters are used only as fallback behind telemetry.launched values; stale telemetry could override proof.
Partial-launch warnings only trigger at zero squads or when status=success; mid-run stalls can be missed.
Monitor hardcodes "full SS-250" label regardless of actual scale.
Live counts displayed from telemetry only; no cross-check with commander queue/results directories.
